reviews.comment:
Paso obligado en el tramo Trelew-Comodoro Rivadavia, donde la distancia es casi interminable. Si visitan lugares como Cabo Raso, Punta Tombo, Camarones, recomendamos cargar combustible en Garayalde.

(Translated by Google)
A mandatory stop on the Trelew-Comodoro Rivadavia stretch, where the distance is almost endless. If you're visiting places like Cabo Raso, Punta Tombo, or Camarones, we recommend refueling in Garayalde.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBb09xeFFnEAE

reviewer.displayName: Ricardo C. Larrondo CC RNFS División Kilo

reviews.comment:
Excelente, como todas las YPF del A.C.A, una atención extraordinaria,personal super amable, buenos precios,buenos descuentos por ser socio,sanitarios en excelentes condiciones. Ubicación 10 puntos. Como uno desearía que sean todas las cosas .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, like all YPF stations affiliated with the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), outstanding service, super friendly staff, good prices, great member discounts, and restrooms in excellent condition. The location is perfect. Just as one would wish everything could be.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRcE1ycnhnRRAB
